en.extract:
The yellow-vented eremomela (Eremomela flavicrissalis) is a species of bird formerly placed in the "Old World warbler" assemblage, but now placed in the family Cisticolidae. It is found in dry savannas in Ethiopia, Kenya, Somalia, Tanzania, and Uganda.

The '''yellow-vented eremomela''' ('''''Eremomela flavicrissalis''''') is a species of bird formerly placed in the "Old World warbler" assemblage, but now placed in the family Cisticolidae. It is found in dry [[savanna]]s in [[Ethiopia]], [[Kenya]], [[Somalia]], [[Tanzania]], and [[Uganda]].
